metadata.title: M5.3 — Import Cascade + Test Rename + Shim Removal + Alias Cleanup
metadata.target_baseline: 835 passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped (WI-0 fixes both pre-existing failures)

comprehension_gate.instruction: MANDATORY FIRST ACTION: Read this entire prompt. Then present a structured summary: (a) Milestone objective in your own words. (b) List of work items with 1-sentence descriptions. (c) Files you will modify/create/delete. (d) Test strategy. (e) Any risks or ambiguities you see. Then STOP and WAIT for Lead Architect approval before proceeding.

execution_prompt.objective: Remove all backward-compatibility shims and legacy aliases created during M5.1 (PA) and M5.2 (AO) NPU→GPU migration. After this milestone, no Python file in services/, shared/, tests/, or phase2_gates/scripts/ should import or reference OrchestratorNPUInference, PolicyNPUInference, or NPUClassificationResult. The AO test file is renamed from test_npu_inference.py → test_gpu_inference.py. The AO npu_inference.py shim file is deleted. The PA gpu_inference.py backward-compat alias declarations are removed.

scope_boundary.included: - AO test file rename + internal rewrite - AO npu_inference.py shim deletion - PA gpu_inference.py alias declarations removal - All import path updates (npu_inference → gpu_inference module references) - All class name substitutions (OrchestratorNPUInference → OrchestratorGPUInference, PolicyNPUInference → PolicyGPUInference, NPUClassificationResult → GPUClassificationResult) - Phase2_gates script import updates - Full grep verification - Regression gate

item.reason: Deliberate API compat — adjudicator.py has explicit 'retained for compatibility' notes from M5.2. These are INTERNAL parameter/field/property names with no external API impact. Renaming would cascade to 100+ test assertion sites for zero functional benefit.

excluded.item: - adjudicator.py: npu_inference parameter, npu_inference_ms field, npu_loaded property, self._npu attribute, npu_result parameter in adjudicate() function

item.reason: Cosmetic local variable names. No functional impact. The adjudicator API accepts these as positional/keyword args with the retained npu_* parameter names.

excluded.item: - Local variable names: npu, npu_result in test files (used as local vars passed to adjudicator API). Helper functions like _make_npu_allow(), _make_npu_stub(). Class names like TestEndToEndWithNPUStub.

item.reason: Historical standalone smoke test script — not part of test suite, uses different model setup (NPU static shapes), no project imports.

work_item.title: Fix 2 pre-existing test failures
work_item.description: Fix two stale test assertions in services/policy_agent/tests/test_gpu_inference.py that have been failing since ADR-012 §2.4 Amendment 2. Both are test-only changes — production code is already correct.

changes.change: Failure: test_stop_token_ids_constants_defined Current: `assert QWEN3_THINK_START_TOKEN_ID == 151668` Fix: `assert QWEN3_THINK_START_TOKEN_ID == 151667` Reason: 151667 is <think> (OPEN), 151668 is </think> (CLOSE). Production code (gpu_inference.py line 93) correctly uses 151667. Documented in LESSONS_LEARNED_QWEN3_THINKING_SUPPRESSION.md.

Failure: test_build_prompt_does_not_contain_no_think Current: def test_build_prompt_does_not_contain_no_think(self) -> None: """Built prompt must NOT include /no_think (ADR-012 §2.4 Amendment).""" ... assert "/no_think" not in prompt Fix: def test_build_prompt_contains_no_think(self) -> None: """Built prompt MUST include /no_think (ADR-012 §2.4 Amendment 2).""" ... assert "/no_think" in prompt Reason: ADR-012 §2.4 Amendment 2 restored /no_think to the PA prompt. The test was written during the brief removal period and never updated.

work_item.note: Execute WI-0 FIRST and run `pytest services/policy_agent/tests/test_gpu_inference.py -k "test_stop_token_ids or test_build_prompt_contains" --tb=short -q` to confirm both fixes pass before proceeding.

work_item.title: Rename AO test file
work_item.description: Rename test_npu_inference.py → test_gpu_inference.py via git mv. Then update the import statement inside the file and replace all class name references.

changes.change: Replace ALL occurrences of `OrchestratorNPUInference` → `OrchestratorGPUInference`. Expected: ~20 occurrences throughout the 694-line file. These appear in: import statement, class instantiations, isinstance checks, mock.patch target strings, docstrings. NOTE: mock.patch strings must also be updated: `"services.assistant_orchestrator.src.npu_inference.OrchestratorNPUInference"` → `"services.assistant_orchestrator.src.gpu_inference.OrchestratorGPUInference"`

work_item.title: Update test_p110_end_to_end.py imports
work_item.description: Update AO import path and remove PA legacy aliases.

changes.change: `from services.assistant_orchestrator.src.npu_inference import ( GenerationResult, OrchestratorNPUInference, )` → `from services.assistant_orchestrator.src.gpu_inference import ( GenerationResult, OrchestratorGPUInference, )`

`from services.policy_agent.src.gpu_inference import ( GPUClassificationResult as NPUClassificationResult, PolicyGPUInference as PolicyNPUInference, CARPromptFormatter, )` → `from services.policy_agent.src.gpu_inference import ( GPUClassificationResult, PolicyGPUInference, CARPromptFormatter, )`

Replace ALL `OrchestratorNPUInference` → `OrchestratorGPUInference` (in mock.patch strings and usages). Replace ALL `PolicyNPUInference` → `PolicyGPUInference` (class instantiations). Replace ALL `NPUClassificationResult` → `GPUClassificationResult` (constructor calls, type annotations, helper function return types).

DO NOT change: `npu_inference=` keyword arguments (adjudicator API parameter name), `npu_inference_ms` field references, `npu_result` local variable names, `_make_npu_allow()` helper function, `npu =` local variable assignments. These use the retained adjudicator API names.

work_item.title: Update PA test files — remove legacy aliases
work_item.description: Remove PolicyGPUInference-as-PolicyNPUInference and GPUClassificationResult-as-NPUClassificationResult aliases from PA test files. Replace all references with the direct GPU class names.

file.name: services/policy_agent/tests/test_adjudicator.py
file.change: `from services.policy_agent.src.gpu_inference import GPUClassificationResult as NPUClassificationResult` → `from services.policy_agent.src.gpu_inference import GPUClassificationResult`

file.name: services/policy_agent/tests/test_integration_car_pipeline.py
file.change: Replace ALL `PolicyNPUInference` → `PolicyGPUInference` (~6 occurrences: lines 114, 145, 162, 183, 200 + docstring line 99). Replace ALL `NPUClassificationResult` → `GPUClassificationResult` (~12 occurrences: lines 82, 236, 250, 264, 278, 290, 303, 327, 338, 349, 368, 379 + docstring line 218).

file.name: services/policy_agent/tests/test_gpu_inference.py
file.change: Remove the two alias imports from the import block (lines 42-43): `NPUClassificationResult,` → DELETE (GPUClassificationResult already imported at line 40) `PolicyNPUInference,` → DELETE (PolicyGPUInference already imported at line 41)

Replace ALL `PolicyNPUInference` → `PolicyGPUInference`. Expected: ~14 occurrences (lines 97, 98, 106, 277, 287, 299, 304, 309, 326, 342, 400, 431 + comment lines 268, 353). Replace the 1 occurrence of `NPUClassificationResult` at line 42 (import — already deleted above). Rename test class `TestPolicyNPUInferenceFailClosed` → `TestPolicyGPUInferenceFailClosed` (line 272). Rename test class `TestPolicyNPUInferenceWithMocks` → `TestPolicyGPUInferenceWithMocks` (line 357). Update corresponding comment headers at lines 268 and 353.
file.note: This file also contains WI-0 changes. Execute WI-0 FIRST, then WI-3 changes in this file. The type annotation `-> PolicyNPUInference` at line 97 must become `-> PolicyGPUInference`.

file.name: services/policy_agent/tests/test_hybrid_adjudicator.py
file.change: Replace ALL `PolicyNPUInference` → `PolicyGPUInference` (~4 occurrences: lines 88, 90, 94). Replace ALL `NPUClassificationResult` → `GPUClassificationResult` (~13 occurrences: lines 184, 362, 474, 503, 589, 650, 667, 814, 815, 818, 869, 875, 881, 889).

work_item.title: Update phase2_gates scripts
work_item.description: Update AO import paths and class references in feasibility scripts.

file.name: phase2_gates/scripts/run_p5_feasibility_002.py
file.change: `from services.assistant_orchestrator.src.npu_inference import ( GenerationConfig, OrchestratorNPUInference, )` → `from services.assistant_orchestrator.src.gpu_inference import ( GenerationConfig, OrchestratorGPUInference, )`
Replace ALL `OrchestratorNPUInference` → `OrchestratorGPUInference`. Expected: ~4 occurrences (lines 25, 151, 267, 279 — includes a string comment at 279).

file.name: phase2_gates/scripts/run_p5_feasibility_003.py
file.change: `from services.assistant_orchestrator.src.npu_inference import ( GenerationConfig, OrchestratorNPUInference, )` → `from services.assistant_orchestrator.src.gpu_inference import ( GenerationConfig, OrchestratorGPUInference, )`

Update string references to old module path: `"services/assistant_orchestrator/src/npu_inference.py::generate_text"` → `"services/assistant_orchestrator/src/gpu_inference.py::generate_text"` Expected: lines ~256-257, ~431-433.

work_item.title: Remove PA deprecated alias declarations
work_item.description: Delete the backward-compat alias block from PA gpu_inference.py.

changes.change:
Delete the entire block: ```python # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Backward-compatible aliases (ADR-010 migration) # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- NPUClassificationResult = GPUClassificationResult """DEPRECATED: Use GPUClassificationResult. Alias retained for migration."""
PolicyNPUInference = PolicyGPUInference """DEPRECATED: Use PolicyGPUInference. Alias retained for migration.""" ```

work_item.title: Delete AO npu_inference.py shim
work_item.description: Remove the backward-compat shim file created in M5.2.
work_item.note: This file is a 15-line shim containing `from gpu_inference import *` plus class alias. All consumers are updated in WI-1 through WI-4 before this deletion.

work_item.title: Grep verification
work_item.description: Run exhaustive grep to confirm no stale references remain in executable code.

commands.step: grep -r "from.*npu_inference import" --include="*.py" services/ shared/ tests/ phase2_gates/scripts/

work_item.note: scripts/smoke_npu_inference.py, .github/prompts/*.md, and docs/ files are excluded from this check — they are historical/documentation artifacts.

work_item.title: Regression gate
work_item.description: Run full regression to confirm no breakage.

execution_prompt.execution_order: 1. Create branch: `git checkout -b feature/p5-task5-m5.3-import-cascade feature/p5-task5-m5.2-ao-gpu-rewrite` 2. Execute WI-0 (fix 2 pre-existing test failures — verify with focused pytest) 3. Execute WI-1 (AO test rename — do the git mv first, then edit the renamed file) 4. Execute WI-2 (test_p110_end_to_end.py) 5. Execute WI-3 (PA test files — test_gpu_inference.py, test_adjudicator.py, test_integration_car_pipeline.py, test_hybrid_adjudicator.py) 6. Execute WI-4 (phase2_gates scripts) 7. Execute WI-5 (remove PA alias declarations) 8. Execute WI-6 (delete AO shim) 9. Execute WI-7 (grep verification — fix any remaining before proceeding) 10. Execute WI-8 (regression gate) 11. Commit.

context_notes.note: The test file likely contains mock.patch decorators with string paths like `"services.assistant_orchestrator.src.npu_inference.OrchestratorNPUInference"`. These MUST be updated to `"services.assistant_orchestrator.src.gpu_inference.OrchestratorGPUInference"`. Search for all `mock.patch` / `@patch` decorators referencing the old module path.

adjudicator.py has these intentionally retained names with explicit compat notes: - `npu_inference` parameter in HybridAdjudicator.__init__() and from_config() - `npu_inference_ms` field in AdjudicationLatency dataclass - `npu_loaded` property - `self._npu` attribute - `npu_result` parameter in adjudicate() function DO NOT rename any of these. They are deliberately retained with documentation notes. Test code that passes `npu_inference=...` kwargs or asserts `npu_inference_ms` values must keep those names to match the production API.

Every occurrence of OrchestratorNPUInference, PolicyNPUInference, NPUClassificationResult in the target files should be replaced with the GPU variant. There are no cases where the old name should be retained in any target file. Use find-replace confidently.

This milestone is purely mechanical find-replace across 9 files + 1 deletion. Use multi_replace_string_in_file for bulk edits within the same file when possible. Read each file's import block first to confirm exact text, then apply replacements. Do NOT read entire 694-line or 1157-line files — read only the sections that need changing, apply targeted replacements.

Lines 848-855 of services/policy_agent/src/gpu_inference.py contain the deprecated alias declarations. After all test consumers are updated in WI-3 (including services/policy_agent/tests/test_gpu_inference.py), these aliases have zero remaining consumers and must be deleted cleanly (remove the comment block + both alias lines + both docstrings).

gate.expected: All pass, 0 failures (WI-0 fixes both pre-existing in this scope).
0 failures (WI-0 fixes both pre-existing). Total passed should be ≥ 835.

execution_prompt.commit_template:
refactor: M5.3 — remove NPU shims + rename AO tests + clean aliases
- git mv test_npu_inference.py → test_gpu_inference.py - Update all imports: npu_inference → gpu_inference module path - Replace OrchestratorNPUInference → OrchestratorGPUInference (all files) - Replace PolicyNPUInference → PolicyGPUInference (test files) - Replace NPUClassificationResult → GPUClassificationResult (test files) - Remove deprecated alias declarations from PA gpu_inference.py - Delete AO npu_inference.py backward-compat shim - Update phase2_gates scripts (feasibility_002, feasibility_003)
- Fix 2 pre-existing test failures (stale assertions from ADR-012 §2.4)
Gate: pytest shared/ services/ tests/ → X passed, 0 failed Grep: zero OrchestratorNPUInference|PolicyNPUInference|NPUClassificationResult in *.py
Task 5 M5.3 | Branch: feature/p5-task5-m5.3-import-cascade

verification.description: Terminal commands for Lead Architect to confirm milestone success:
